---
title: "Chapter 4: Biogeochemistry and Geographic Variation in Fish Populations"
subtitle: "(working title)"
author:
  - name: Cali Pfleger
    email: calipfleger@ucsb.edu
date: last-modified
bibliography: literature/bibliography.bib
---

::: {.callout-tip appearance="simple" icon=false}
🎞 **[View this chapter as a slideshow →](presentations/chapter4-slides.html)**
:::

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple" icon=false}
📅 **[View the living progress timeline →](presentations/chapter4-progress.html)** — auto-updated nightly with new figures + daily summary.
:::

## Abstract

_Scope TBD. Chapter 4 is the biogeochemistry / geo-fish chapter. Working title and scientific questions need to be finalized._

## Introduction

_Placeholder — fill in with the research question, geographic scope, and relationship to the preceding paleoclimate chapters._

## Methods

_To be written._

## Results

## Discussion

## Conclusions

## References {.unnumbered}

::: {#refs}
:::
